title: Blackstone (BX)Intrinsic Value
description: A transparent, step-by-step discounted cash flow valuation of Blackstone Inc. Using actual financials to arrive at a single fair value estimate for BX shares.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-guojhg47>
Blackstone's immense scale and shift toward perpetual capital vehicles supply structurally growing management fees. Performance fees and realizations can be lumpy, but a blended 12% FCF CAGR maps reasonably to their asset gathering velocity.

verdictFooter: Based on FY2025 actuals. Data via S&P Global (Mar 18, 2026).
